perPress.label: positional-encoding
perPress.answerPreview:
The paper uses **sinusoidal positional encoding**, where each position $pos$ gets a vector with entries defined by sine and cosine at varying frequencies:

$$PE_{(pos, 2i)} = \sin(pos / 10000^{2i/d_{\text{model}}}), \quad PE_{(pos, 2i+1)} = \cos(pos / 10000^{2i/d_{\text{model}}})$$

perPress.label: opinion-generalization
